reviews.comment:
Regresamos de Brasil y Paraguay países donde los baños son un lujo. Los baños del ACA Ita Ibaté no conoces de higiene, un asco los Socios del ACA no nos merecemos baños así!!!

(Translated by Google)
We've just returned from Brazil and Paraguay, countries where the bathrooms are a luxury. The bathrooms at the ACA Ita Ibaté are utterly unhygienic, disgusting! We ACA members don't deserve bathrooms like this!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBLXBhNzNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza los baños, no se puede entrar en el estado en que están, lleno de moscas por la falta de limpieza. Está en un lugar de paso de muchos viajeros y turistas, estaría bueno que limpien más seguido!!!

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are a disgrace; you can't even go in the state they're in, swarming with flies due to lack of cleaning. It's in a place frequented by many travelers and tourists; they should clean them more often!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBaFBpNnR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene un bello espacio verde como para descansar un poco tanto de ida como al regreso. Lo único q deberían mejorar es el baño. Muy sucio y solo 2 para usar. Siempre se forman filas para entrar

(Translated by Google)
It has a lovely green space where you can rest a bit on the way there and back. The only thing they should improve is the restroom. It's very dirty and there are only two to use. There are always lines to get in.

The beach staff is very friendly.
